serverInfo.name: gcc-intelligence-mcp
serverInfo.description: GCC regulatory intelligence for AI agents — ZATCA e-invoicing, Arabic NLP, UAE Corporate Tax, and compliance tools for Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman, and Qatar
serverInfo.author: THRONE AI

tools.name: zatca_generate_invoice_xml
tools.description: Generate ZATCA-compliant UBL 2.1 e-invoice XML with QR code for Saudi Arabia Phase 2

tools.name: zatca_validate_invoice
tools.description: Validate invoice XML against ZATCA Phase 1 or Phase 2 requirements

tools.name: zatca_get_wave_status
tools.description: Check ZATCA e-invoicing wave status and deadlines by revenue threshold

tools.name: gcc_validate_vat
tools.description: Validate VAT/TIN numbers for all 6 GCC countries

tools.name: gcc_lookup_company
tools.description: Look up GCC company by commercial registration number

tools.name: arabic_analyze_text
tools.description: Analyze Arabic text — dialect detection, sentiment, entity extraction, keywords

tools.name: arabic_extract_entities
tools.description: Extract named entities from Arabic text (persons, orgs, locations, amounts)

tools.name: gcc_compliance_checklist
tools.description: Get regulatory compliance checklist by GCC country and business type

tools.name: gcc_regulatory_deadlines
tools.description: Track upcoming GCC regulatory deadlines (ZATCA, UAE CT, labor, licensing)

tools.name: gcc_convert_currency
tools.description: Convert between GCC currencies (all USD-pegged fixed rates)

tools.name: gcc_exchange_rates
tools.description: Get current exchange rates for GCC currencies

resources.description: ZATCA e-invoicing overview and Phase 2 requirements
UAE Corporate Tax rates, deadlines, and penalties
VAT rates for all 6 GCC countries
